subcodes.first_line: O Rida! Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and We have taken it up and become acquainted with the words contained therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و انا کنا آخذین و عرفنا بما فیه من کلماتک و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
